data:
## Walmart+OR+WMT Google News, from 2026-02-13 to 2026-02-20:

### Walmart's first earnings under John Furner show resilient demand (source: Axios) 

AxiosWalmart's first earnings under John Furner show resilient demandThe earnings suggest shoppers are still prioritizing price and convenience..1 day ago

### Amazon dethrones Walmart as the world's biggest company by sales (source: NPR) 

NPRAmazon dethrones Walmart as the world's biggest company by salesIn a slow-motion race of two retail behemoths, Amazon's trump card was its lucrative cloud-computing business..1 day ago

Barron'sWalmart Earnings Beat Estimates. Why the Market Shrugged It Off.Walmart's fourth-quarter earnings report was an eventful one. Walmart stock had a muted reaction..1 day ago
